        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.NullableHolder>? __NullableHolder;

            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.NullableHolder>
            {
                PropertiesFactory = __CreateProperties_NullableHolder,
                ConstructorFactory = __CreateConstructor_NullableHolder,
                Provider = this,
            };
        }
